case_title: DANIEL S. HOSHIYAMA VS. DEBORAH A. CHRISTIAN et al

docket_entries.description: MINUTES FOR APR-28-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-02-2005 VACATED. PARTIES APPEARED AT TRIAL CALL. MATTER SETTLED. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT NOT PUT ON THE RECORD. STIPULATION & ORDER OF SETTLEMENT SIGNED & FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. OKAZAKI; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOSHIYAMA, DANIEL S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN, DEBORAH A.
